name: Western Union
description_short: Garfield Heights Western Union on Turney Rd offers money transfers, bill payments, and money orders to customers throughout the area.
description_long:
The Western Union location at 4948 Turney Rd in Garfield Heights, OH is a standalone money transfer center, open seven days a week from 7 AM to 10 PM for the convenience of Garfield Heights residents.

This Garfield Heights, OH branch offers domestic and international money transfers, bill payment services, and money orders. For specific questions about transfer fees, destinations, or available services, contact the location at +1 216-641-0398.

Residents of Garfield Heights who need to send money quickly should bring a valid government-issued ID and have the recipient's information ready. Western Union at this location provides a fast, reliable option for same-day transfers.
pros: Extensive global network of agent locations for convenient cash pickup
Multi-language support including English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese
Multiple service options including money transfers, bill payment, and mobile top-ups
Western Union Rewards program for frequent users
Track transfer feature allowing customers to monitor sent funds
Prepaid card options available for receiving money
Online and in-person sending options available
cons: Website displays 404 errors and service disruptions (Orange wallet temporarily unavailable)
Limited detailed service information accessible from the provided website content
Reliance on agent network means not all locations available in all areas
Geolocation feature requires browser permissions to find nearest locations
No specific pricing, fee, or APR information visible on the location-finding pages provided
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers needing cash access without traditional bank accounts
International remittance senders supporting family members in other countries
Multilingual speakers in immigrant communities requiring money transfer services
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked consumers and international remittance senders who need convenient cash access through physical agent locations rather than traditional banking infrastructure. The primary caveat is that service quality and specific fees are not transparent from the website content provided, and the company's digital platform appears to have technical issues limiting full service visibility.
meta_description: Western Union at 4948 Turney Rd, Garfield Heights, OH. Quick money transfers and bill payments available daily.
seo_title: Western Union in Garfield Heights, OH | CreditDoc
